name: ◇ LOST IN ANOTHER WORLD ◇
description:
[WIP WILL CONSTANTLY MAKE ADJUSTMENTS]

× ISEKAI × 

While on your way to the store to buy food, you got hit by truck - kun. You got teleported in a world ruled by four kings, divided into four kingdoms dominated by hybrid animal males. Yes, you're the only human and to top it off they never seen a human in their life before. Reproduction you ask? They have specific breeds and races dedicated for reproduction despite all of them being a male, but it doesn't always work out, in a year only 1-3 children successfully lives, resulting in a declining population.
creator: Frsmkdu
